Homebrew Formulae

webkitgtk

Install command:

GTK interface to WebKit

https://webkitgtk.org

License: GPL-3.0-or-later

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/webkitgtk.json

Formula code: webkitgtk.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 2.52.4

Depends on:

at-spi2-core 2.60.4 Protocol definitions and daemon for D-Bus at-spi
cairo 1.18.4 Vector graphics library with cross-device output support
enchant 2.8.16 Spellchecker wrapping library
expat 2.8.1 XML 1.0 parser
fontconfig 2.18.1 XML-based font configuration API for X Windows
freetype 2.14.3 Software library to render fonts
gdk-pixbuf 2.44.6 Toolkit for image loading and pixel buffer manipulation
glib 2.88.1 Core application library for C
gstreamer 1.28.4 Development framework for multimedia applications
gtk+3 3.24.52 Toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces
harfbuzz 14.2.1 OpenType text shaping engine
icu4c@78 78.3 C/C++ and Java libraries for Unicode and globalization
jpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression
jpeg-xl 0.11.2 New file format for still image compression
libavif 1.4.2 Library for encoding and decoding .avif files
libdrm 2.4.134 Library for accessing the direct rendering manager
libepoxy 1.5.10 Library for handling OpenGL function pointer management
libgcrypt 1.12.2 Cryptographic library based on the code from GnuPG
libnotify 0.8.8 Library that sends desktop notifications to a notification daemon
libpng 1.6.58 Library for manipulating PNG images
libsecret 0.21.7 Library for storing/retrieving passwords and other secrets
libsoup 3.6.6 HTTP client/server library for GNOME
libtasn1 4.21.0 ASN.1 structure parser library
libwpe 1.16.3 General-purpose library for WPE WebKit
libx11 1.8.13 X.Org: Core X11 protocol client library
libxcomposite 0.4.7 X.Org: Client library for the Composite extension
libxml2 2.15.3 GNOME XML library
libxslt 1.1.45 C XSLT library for GNOME
libxt 1.3.1 X.Org: X Toolkit Intrinsics library
little-cms2 2.19 Color management engine supporting ICC profiles
mesa 26.1.3 Graphics Library
openjpeg 2.5.4 Library for JPEG-2000 image manipulation
pango 1.57.1 Framework for layout and rendering of i18n text
sqlite 3.53.2 Command-line interface for SQLite
sysprof 50.0 Statistical, system-wide profiler
systemd 261 System and service manager
wayland 1.25.0 Protocol for a compositor to talk to its clients
webp 1.6.0 Image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images
woff2 1.0.2 Utilities to create and convert Web Open Font File (WOFF) files
wpebackend-fdo 1.16.1 Freedesktop.org backend for WPE WebKit
zlib-ng-compat 2.3.3 Zlib replacement with optimizations for next generation systems

Depends on when building from source:

cmake 4.3.4 Cross-platform make
gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library
gobject-introspection 1.86.0 Generate introspection data for GObject libraries
gperf 3.3 Perfect hash function generator
perl 5.42.2 Highly capable, feature-rich programming language
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
python@3.14 3.14.6 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language
ruby 4.0.5 Powerful, clean, object-oriented scripting language
unifdef 2.12 Selectively process conditional C preprocessor directives

Requires: Linux
